package: Pocket AI model compatibility and knowledge matrix
target: Termux on unrooted Android phones with natural bilingual conversation, a detailed grade 1-12 school foundation, evidence-first reasoning, exact local tools, guarded sub-two-minute local inference, and live hardware tuning

checks: processor identifiers and family
ABI and 32/64-bit userspace
logical cores and CPU frequency
short integer and floating-point benchmark
total and currently available RAM
free application and shared storage
bundled model presence
live thermal-zone and battery temperature
split GGUF part count, size, header, and SHA-256 integrity
battery level, health, charging and power-saving state
GGUF header and SHA-256 integrity during full scan
resource pressure between sequential hybrid passes
continuous RAM/CPU/thermal/battery tuning before each inference
hardware-combination ID and live inference plan
universal knowledge and natural dialogue availability
lexical WordNet shard availability
offline encyclopedia shard availability and integrity
shared 112-second inference deadline
advanced reasoning module availability
exact-tool and answer-audit readiness
official optional-model LFS metadata and local sidecar integrity
detailed school curriculum database availability and integrity
natural follow-up and confusion-recovery module availability
grade/depth detection and school evidence routing
shared_foundations: natural English/Greek conversation with contextual follow-ups
answer relevance validation and extractive recovery
exact arithmetic, algebra, statistics, conversion, and character-count tools

models.name: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct Q2_K
models.processor_combinations: Entry-level or better 64-bit ARM/x86; Cortex-A53/A55, Snapdragon 2/4+, Helio A/P/G, Exynos 7/850+, Unisoc SC9863/T+, Kirin 6+
models.reconstruction: automatic on first use or by Other Files/install_models.sh

models.name: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct Q4_1
models.processor_combinations: Efficient entry/mid-range or better; Snapdragon 6/7/8, Dimensity, Helio G8x/G9x, Exynos 9/1xxx/2xxx, Tensor, Kirin 8/9, Unisoc T7/T8/T9
models.reconstruction: automatic on first use or by Other Files/install_models.sh

models.name: Qwen3 0.6B Q8_0
models.sha256: resolved from official Hugging Face LFS metadata at installation time
models.processor_combinations: Recommended reasoning tier for capable 4 GB+ 64-bit phones; non-thinking and short-context operation protects the two-minute budget.
models.size_note: Resolved and verified from official Hugging Face LFS metadata at installation time
models.verification: official LFS SHA-256 and size + GGUF header + local checksum sidecar

models.name: Qwen3 1.7B Q8_0
models.size_note: Resolved and verified from official Hugging Face LFS metadata at installation time
models.sha256: resolved from official Hugging Face LFS metadata at installation time
models.processor_combinations: Strongest guarded phone tier for capable 8 GB-class 64-bit devices.
models.verification: official LFS SHA-256 and size + GGUF header + local checksum sidecar

models.name: PocketAI Micro neural classifier
models.processor_combinations: Any Termux/Python-compatible processor; emergency and sub-1 GB profile

models.name: PocketAI Lite neural classifier
models.processor_combinations: Legacy 32/64-bit and low-end processors; approximately 1 GB or more

models.name: PocketAI Balanced neural classifier
models.processor_combinations: Cortex-A53/A55 and comparable entry processors; approximately 1.5-2.5 GB

models.name: PocketAI Standard neural classifier
models.processor_combinations: Galaxy A12-class or better; approximately 3-4 GB

models.name: PocketAI Max neural classifier
models.processor_combinations: Modern entry/mid-range or better; approximately 4 GB+

models.name: PocketAI Bilingual MicroLM Lite
models.processor_combinations: Any processor for Lite; Quality is automatically preferred when roughly 2.2 GB total RAM and 360 MB free RAM are available

models.name: PocketAI Bilingual MicroLM Quality
models.processor_combinations: Any processor for Lite; Quality is automatically preferred when roughly 2.2 GB total RAM and 360 MB free RAM are available

runner.name: llama.cpp llama-cli
runner.reason: Native runner is compiled for the phone architecture; all AI model data is already bundled

conversation_features: confusion recovery with a different explanation
persona_system.disclosure: Natural conversational style while still identifying as an AI.

help_menu: Scan phone and automatically choose the best model
Change the AI name and speaking style
Teach the AI a question and answer
Learn from a file or folder
Safely research the web and learn
Open the detailed grade 1-12 school tutor

school_foundation.honest_scope: Broad cross-curriculum foundation; not a verbatim copy of every national textbook, teacher plan, or examination board.

universal_knowledge.backend: SQLite FTS5 with exact alias index
universal_knowledge.routing: direct exact answer, indexed retrieval, compact context injection, then selected model

gguf_distribution.format: ordered binary parts with automatic verified reconstruction
